name: Spa Santa Ponsa (Fontenille)
description: The Santa Ponsa estate's spa lives in the 18th-century cistern of a former palace, among listed gardens. Indoor pool, sauna and hammam, with Susanne Kaufmann skincare and yoga classes: high-end wellbeing with a spa day open to visitors.

highlights: A spa in the old 18th-century cistern: indoor pool with jets, sauna and hammam
Treatments with Susanne Kaufmann natural skincare
Yoga classes and a spa day pass open to non-guests
